overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character walking along a scenic coastal cliffside. The character approaches and arrives at a small campsite featuring a red tent and campfire, with the ocean visible to the left and mountains in the background. The environment features lush grass, rocky outcrops, and bright sunny lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy coastal cliff toward a distant campsite visible ahead

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water visible along the left side of the cliff
rocky cliff formations extending along the coastline
hazy mountain range visible across the water in the background
lush green grass covering the cliffside path
solitary large tree with green foliage marking the campsite location
small red canvas tent visible in the distance near the tree

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide-open coastal cliff path with the ocean visible to the left and distant mountains across the water. The terrain is covered in lush green grass, and a large tree with a red tent beneath it marks the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching campsite with tent and cooking area

events.description: red tent becomes prominent and campfire comes into view as character approaches campsite

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the campsite, navigating around rocky outcrops while the tent grows larger in view

entered.detail: large gray boulders and rock formations scattered on the right side
small campfire with stones arranged around it
circular arrangement of stones containing the fire

segments.scene_description: The character gets closer to the campsite, with the red tent now prominent on the right and the large tree shifting to the left. The ocean and distant mountains fade from view as rocky outcrops and the campfire become visible. The character continues walking forward with a slight turn toward the camp.

scene_state.functional_zone: small campsite with fire pit and cooking setup

events.description: arriving at the campfire area revealing cooking pot, wooden logs, and camp supplies

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire and examining the cooking setup and camp amenities

entered.detail: metal pot suspended over the campfire on a tripod
cut log serving as a bench or seating near the fire
neatly stacked pile of cut wood for the fire
wooden storage crate near the firewood stack

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the heart of the campsite, now partially shaded by the large tree overhead. The campfire with its cooking pot becomes the central focus, surrounded by a wooden log bench and stacked firewood. The red tent stands prominently to the right as the character explores the immediate camp area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a scenic coastal cliffside that gradually narrows into the intimate setting of a small campsite. It begins with the character walking along a wide-open path of lush green grass, with the ocean and distant mountains stretching out to the left. As the character advances, the expansive vista fades from view, and the perspective shifts toward a prominent red tent and a large tree that begin to frame the path. The scene then closes in as the camera turns toward the heart of the camp, moving from the open sunlight into the partial shade of the overhead branches. Finally, the focus settles on the central campfire and its cooking pot, surrounded by a wooden log bench and stacked firewood.
